title: Divorce: A Journey Through the Kids' Eyes
original_title: Divorce: A Journey Through the Kid's Eyes
overview: A powerful examination of the effects of divorce told by kids for kids that the whole family will benefit from. Witness testimonies as kids face the trauma, work through the pain, and learn to heal.
